llf.description: Measures the fit of the model. Lower (more negative) values indicate worse fit.
llf.range: Typically negative (unbounded below). Relative metric - compare between models.
llf.interpretation: Current value -259.22 - Used for likelihood ratio tests

aic.description: Model selection criterion that balances fit and complexity. Lower is better.
aic.range: Positive values (can be negative). Relative metric - compare between models. Lower indicates better fit.
aic.acceptable_interpretation: No absolute threshold - use for model comparison only
aic.interpretation: Current value 530.43 - Compare with other models to select best fit

bic.description: Similar to AIC but penalizes model complexity more heavily. Lower is better.
bic.range: Positive values (can be negative). Relative metric - compare between models. Penalizes complexity more than AIC.
bic.acceptable_interpretation: No absolute threshold - use for model comparison only
bic.interpretation: Current value 558.54 - Preferred when sample size is large

log_likelihood.description: Probability of observing the training data given the model parameters.
log_likelihood.range: Typically negative (unbounded below). Higher (less negative) values indicate better fit.
log_likelihood.interpretation: Current value -259.22 - Basis for likelihood ratio tests and model comparison

pseudo_r_squared.description: Indicates proportion of variation in target explained by model (0 to 1 scale).
pseudo_r_squared.interpretation: Current value 0.5325 (53.25%) - Excellent - Model explains substantial variation in target

const.interpretation: Not significant - No meaningful effect on target variable

feature_1.interpretation: Not significant - No meaningful effect on target variable

feature_2.interpretation: Not significant - No meaningful effect on target variable

feature_3.interpretation: Highly significant - Strong effect on target variable

feature_4.interpretation: Not significant - No meaningful effect on target variable

feature_5.interpretation: Highly significant - Strong effect on target variable
